text.message: You guys just gonna let blue take the 2/1 huh?
Lol, why would they want you to have it over me?
They could at least slow you down for it. I’ve got no chance, no brick to get.
You'd be mad strong with the port? stronger than me actually. You have equal wood, you have sheep, which I don't and better wheat
I'll leave you wood port for a wheat here
The dude in last, who can’t build anywhere else???
That might be the worst steal I’ve ever seen
Black is obv the rob from his pov as well
But he is, indeed, clapping us tho
And afraid to admit his mistake
